public_profile.summary: Elegant and knowledgeable, responsible for authenticating the clocktower artifacts.

verbal_tells: Corrects small facts when under pressure.
personality_profile.protective_reason: A forgery scandal would end her career and ruin the heritage project.

facts_known: She discovered one artifact in the restoration exhibit was a forgery.
secrets: She replaced an inspection tag before the police arrived.
non_negotiables: Clara Whitmore must stay consistent with the authored solution.

dialogue_rules.lie_strategy: deflect until the evidence becomes too specific

public_profile.summary: Stern and practical, hired to manage the gala’s private security.

personality_profile.outward_goal: Keep the event failure from becoming his responsibility.
personality_profile.protective_reason: If exposed, it proves he broke protocol during the critical window.

facts_known: He allowed someone into the locked maintenance stairwell before midnight.
secrets: He erased one entry from the security access log.
non_negotiables: Marcus Hale must stay consistent with the authored solution.

dialogue_rules.lie_strategy: deflect until the evidence becomes too specific
